flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gwinnett Technical College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gwinnett Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gwinnett Technical College rose 48% between 2006 and 2009 (17.4% → 25.8%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gwinnett Technical College are 37% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($45.0k vs $33.0k).
